sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59254" key="korwneka/bh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορωνεκάβη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n59254.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a Hecuba, as old as a crow,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.67</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Myrin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
